reviewedCourts.reviewReason: The current official recreation page confirms Friday adult open gym after its single July 3 closure. A current Volo public listing also documents separate men's and coed league openings at this exact venue on July 15.

courtSchedules.sourceTitle: Open Gym Basketball - City of Emeryville, CA
courtSchedules.seasonEndBasis: operational re-verification horizon; the official page presents an ongoing Friday schedule and identifies July 3 as the only listed closure
courtSchedules.access: Ages 18+. Adult drop-in is $6 resident/$7 non-resident; a 10-visit pass is $49 resident/$55 non-resident. Players join individually and games are recommended at 10 minutes when a waitlist forms

slots.title: Open Gym Basketball - Emeryville Center of Community Life
slots.scheduleText: Fridays 8:00-11:00 PM; ages 18+; the current page lists July 3 as a closure date

courtEvents.uncertainty: The public listing proves the July 15 opening date and time but does not publish a season end. Only the concrete opening sessions are published here; no ongoing recurrence is asserted.

retireCourtEvents.reason: The prior generic July 1 series was unbounded. The refreshed public listing identifies separate men's and coed July 15 openings but does not prove a season end, so the stale recurring row is replaced by concrete opening events.
